author: spencer_tb
content:
🌞 Our first mainnet test release from EELS is out: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests@v20.0.0

**Note this is up to Osaka/BPO2 only (current stable mainnet)!**

All fixture releases will be published from EELS moving forward as EEST is now fully archived, further details on the latter will be communicated within <#595701770034872362> 🔜 tm.

Please note this release replaces the old `fixtures_stable` artifact, and uses our new release schedule format from this [PR](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2888). Our releases docs [page](https://steel.ethereum.foundation/docs/execution-specs/running_tests/releases/) additionally contains these details.

🆙 What changes for you:
- One release type for mainnet CI: `tests@vX.Y.Z`, a single `fixtures.tar.gz` with all tests for all forks up to the latest mainnet fork.
- Why v20? BPO2 is the 20th mainnet fork, so this release is up to date with Osaka + BPO1 + BPO2.
- Expect `v20.0.z` bumps as new tests land. `tests@v21.0.0` will be tagged as the first Amsterdam mainnet release for the first testnet.
- Devnet / benchmark / zkevm releases continue separately as `tests-<feature>@vX.Y.Z`.

PTAL at the release notes for versioning and download options! As always please ping if there are any issues.
